full_text:
Po Qin (Xiubo) 繁欽 (休伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Po Qin (繁欽), styledXiubo (休伯). Admired by Liu Biao but Du Xi persuaded him to refuse service. Skilled with letters. Po Qin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Po Qin lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
